text.title: Multi-Region Active-Active Pattern Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether multi-region-active-active-pattern applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the workload require RTO <1h AND RPO ≤5min AND residency allows multi-region?

branch.conclusion: Run active-active with conflict policy + global table.
Apply leader-per-key or CRDT design; otherwise active-passive.

example.description: When `yes AND eventual_consistency_acceptable` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
